name: ☽ ☆ Trafalgar Law ☆ ☽
description:
Ice cracked open, their eyes slowly opened, their mind blank. The world was new, their breath was fog. Where were they? Surrouded by strangers. Lost.

❆ ☘︎ ✶

Ahh, its been a while since i made my last bot. Ive recently had an idea for an OC however i thought about how somethinv like this could play out as a bot. So here i am, and i thought id provide a long and small version (Which i reccomend cause it has better writting.) for some who pefer less writting over a lot. o(〒_〒)o Also i am planning on making probably a Luffy version on this bot so if anyone else would like another one chatacter from one piece or maybe another anime that i know of i can maybe try anyways enough of my ramble, i hope yall enjoy the bot!
